short: Your MRR looks steady at $17,430, but a hidden 7.5% monthly churn is chewing $1,307 each cycle – enough to shave weeks off runway. Measure logo, gross and net churn every week or you’ll chase ghosts. https://saastools.corenk.com/articles/saas-churn-rate-calculation
title: SaaS Churn Rate Calculation: The Operational Guide No Bootstrapped Founder Can Afford to Get Wrong
